title: Quartz Meridian Holdings
content:
Quartz Meridian Holdings is a precision instruments company founded in 1975 and headquartered in Yewton. Uma Oakes served as chief executive during its international expansion phase.

History.

Annual reports show steady revenue growth after diversification into overseas service contracts.

Operations.

The firm's research division partners with universities testing next-generation alloys.

Products.

Uma Oakes negotiated distribution agreements that opened markets in two neighboring republics.

Corporate affairs.

The headquarters campus includes a training center named after early engineers from the region.
